findings.impact: The unchanged export contract says nightly callers shell out without flags and rely on JSON by default. After this change, the no-flag CLI path emits markdown instead, which will break those consumers immediately even though the PR description says existing JSON behavior should remain intact.
findings.test_gap: The visible CI only exercises markdown snapshots, so there is no test covering the unchanged no-flag CLI contract.
findings.title: Changing the CLI default to markdown breaks no-flag automation consumers

findings.impact: Mapping the json key to render_markdown means export_report(..., output="json") now returns a string, and the unchanged CLI json branch serializes that string into quoted markdown instead of a machine-readable object with a top-level version field. Any downstream caller that explicitly asks for json will lose the documented contract.
findings.test_gap: The skipped json-contract suite leaves the explicit --output json path unverified in this stack.
findings.title: The json renderer registry entry now returns markdown for explicit json requests

summary: The PR adds markdown support, but it regresses both unchanged JSON contracts the description says must stay intact: the no-flag CLI path now emits markdown, and explicit json selection is routed through the markdown renderer.
